overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student in white robes walking through a snowy castle courtyard, entering the building, ascending grand staircases, and navigating corridors to reach the Gryffindor Common Room entrance. The video transitions from bright outdoor winter lighting to dimmer atmospheric interiors with Gothic stone architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the snow-dusted stone bridge toward the large wooden entrance door

entered.detail: tall stone castle wall with arched windows and ivy
ornate dark wooden double doors with Gothic stone arch frame
stone balustrade with snow dusted on top
stone balustrade with snow dusted on top

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a snow-covered stone bridge flanked by balustrades, approaching a large Gothic wooden door set in a castle wall. Morning sunlight casts long shadows across the snowy pavement.

events.description: character opens and walks through the large wooden door from outdoor courtyard to indoor entrance hall
lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to dim, atmospheric interior with fog

agents.ego_description: pushing open the heavy wooden door and stepping into the misty entrance hall

entered.detail: stone archway leading deeper into the castle interior

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bright winter courtyard into a dim, foggy entrance hall. The large wooden door swings open and closes behind as the scene shifts to interior stone architecture with wall sconces.

events.description: character turns slightly right to follow the corridor layout toward the grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor passing by other students and magical portraits on the walls

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking ahead toward the staircase
ghostly figure floating near the top of the grand staircase

entered.detail: dark wood paneling covering the lower corridor walls
gilded frames containing magical moving portraits
wide stone staircase ascending to upper castle levels

segments.scene_description: Walking through a corridor lined with dark wood paneling and magical portraits, the character approaches a grand staircase. Other students walk ahead, and a ghostly figure floats near the stair landing.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase with tall Gothic windows

events.description: transition from the main straight staircase to a curved spiral staircase section

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand stone staircase following another student upward through the tower

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes ascending the stairs ahead
student descending the stairs on the opposite side

entered.detail: narrow arched windows with bright light streaming through the stone wall
curved stone staircase wrapping around a central tower wall
rough-hewn stone wall of the stairwell

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand stone staircase illuminated by tall Gothic windows, transitioning into a spiral stair section. Other students pass by on the opposite side of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: vaulted corridor leading to Gryffindor Common Room

events.description: text overlay 'Gryffindor Common Room' appears indicating the destination has been reached
character slows and stops before the Fat Lady portrait

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper corridor approaching the entrance to the Gryffindor Common Room

notable_agents.action: student leaning against wall near a portrait frame
group of students conversing in the corridor

entered.detail: high ribbed stone vault ceiling with Gothic arches
large portrait of a woman in pink dress guarding the common room entrance
wooden bench along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long corridor with a high vaulted ceiling lined with portraits, approaching the Fat Lady portrait that guards the Gryffindor Common Room. Other students stand and converse along the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, snowy exterior into the dim, atmospheric depths of a Gothic castle. It begins on a snow-covered stone bridge under morning sunlight, moving toward a large wooden door set into the castle wall. As the door swings open, the scene shifts from the bright winter light into a dim, foggy entrance hall characterized by stone architecture and flickering wall sconces. The camera then glides through corridors of dark wood paneling and past floating ghosts before ascending a grand stone staircase illuminated by tall Gothic windows. Finally, the movement flows through a high vaulted hallway lined with portraits, passing conversing students to reach the portrait guarding the Gryffindor Common Room.
